title: CVE-2026-33890 — Unauthenticated Admin Privilege Escalation via Passkey Registration
excerpt: MyTube's WebAuthn passkey registration endpoints are exposed without authentication. An attacker can register an arbitrary passkey and receive a full admin token — zero credentials required.

title: CVE-2026-33735 — Improper Access Control Allows Complete Application Takeover
excerpt: A flawed string-matching access control check in MyTube's middleware can be bypassed by appending a query parameter, allowing a visitor to fully replace the application's SQLite database.

title: CVE-2026-33935 — Unauthenticated Account Lockout via Shared Login Attempt State
excerpt: All three of MyTube's password verification endpoints share a single global login attempt counter. Any unauthenticated attacker can trigger a rolling 24-hour DoS against all password-based auth.
